title: Principal Frontend Developer at Freshworks Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Freshworks Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks Ventures Solutions in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks Ventures Solutions:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks Ventures Solutions!
